ddls:
CREATE TABLE "test_cases" (
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each test case */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the test case */,
  "pre_conditions" TEXT /* Pre-conditions required before executing the test case */,
  "test_data" TEXT /* Test data used for the test case */,
  "expected_results" TEXT /* Expected result after executing the test case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the test case (e.g., Draft, Approved, In Progress, Completed) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the test case (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the test case */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was created */,
  "last_modified_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who last modified the test case */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was last modified */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the test case (e.g., Functional, Security, Performance) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("test_case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_last_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("last_modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_cases_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_execution_results" (
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each execution result */,
  "test_case_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the test case that was executed */,
  "actual_results" TEXT /* Actual result obtained after executing the test case */,
  "execution_date" TEXT /* Date when the test case was executed */,
  "executed_by" TEXT /* Name of the tester who executed the test case */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the execution (e.g., Passed, Failed, In Progress) */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the test execution in seconds */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the execution */,
  "ci_cd_pipeline_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the CI/CD pipeline if the test was executed automatically */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_execution_results_test_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("test_case_id") REFERENCES test_cases ("test_case_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the testing team (e.g., tester, manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user for contact purposes */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "test_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "execution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the execution result associated with the log */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message detailing the log entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the log entry was created */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the log (e.g., INFO, WARNING, ERROR) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the log (e.g., Test Case Execution, Manual Entry) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who created the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_execution_id FOREIGN KEY ("execution_id") REFERENCES test_execution_results ("execution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_test_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
